---
title: "About Me"
---

# About Me

## Background
I am an Environmental Studies student at UCSB. I come from a very small rural town in Northern California called Coloma, CA. I am a first generation college student. 

## Interests
- Ecology
- Climate change
- Data science

## Personal Life

![](img1.jpg)
![](img2.jpg)
![](img3.jpg)

I enjoy hiking, being outdoors, and spending my time between the mountains and the ocean.
I paint, draw, and craft florals, landscapes, and marine themed pieces.
